primary_metric.name: landed-non-empty (session x action) pairs, live on billion, cold reset-to-seed
primary_metric.denominator_source: rosetta-extensions/stack-seeding/presets/content-manifest.json (M233 canonical projection); has_manager_view is per-session. CORRECTED at M236 iter-07 from 31 to 29: driving the skill-path manager route live showed the platform surface is UNIMPLEMENTED (InsightsBySkillPathStudentSimulationsContainer renders 'Coming soon' with its results table commented out and userData hardcoded null -- no query reads the seeded session), so its 2 manager pairs are NOT LANDABLE and leave the denominator under the same fail-closed rule that already excludes ai-labs. Arithmetic on the corrected SERVED manifest: 18 sessions + 13 manager views = 31 raw pairs, minus 2 ai-labs presence-only = 29 landable. 31 was never a count of provable pairs -- it assumed a surface that does not exist.

academy_grid_real_cards.status: MET (cold, iter-10; discharges M230 carry-forward cluster 1)
academy_grid_real_cards.note: The ANONYMOUS /library + /free routes still render 0 — M230 cluster 3, getPublicCatalogView's new Set() branch is uncovered by the M230 patch. Out of gate; handler ACADEMY-M236-iter08-public-catalog-twin -> release close.

p95_click_to_access_ms.scope: HERO vantages only (user decision B2); content-seat latency OUT OF SCOPE for v2.5
p95_click_to_access_ms.note: The COLD stack measured ~2x faster than the warm one it replaced (which had been up for hours across 3 cockpit restarts + 2 re-pins). iter-09's numbers are the PESSIMISTIC pair; do not treat 1.2 s as expected steady state.

platform_repo_edits.note: Verified per-clone (iter-10): platform/next-web-app/app/jobsimulation/skillpath/sentinel/storage/graphql-wundergraph all 0 modified. cms shows an untracked studio/ (the make init-studio clone, no tracked file modified). ant-academy shows 4 modified — serverTenant.js (M230 fs-published patch) + next.config.js (M212-215 allowedDevOrigins patch) + 2 build-generated public/ files — the SANCTIONED live-patch mechanism on the demo's ephemeral gitignored clone, reverted on --stop. The canonical anthropos-work repos were never touched.

tests.as_of: M236 close (2026-07-20), full suites across every stack

typescript_playwright.note: 24 of stack-verify's 151 collected tests and 15 of playthroughs' 84 require a live demo stack and were not executed.

stack-core.note: was 147/5 at close open; the 5 doc-truth guard failures were FIXED at this close. The 2 remaining are test_m220_mutation_battery, verified identical at playbill-m236-hardened via a detached worktree -- pre-existing, not M236.

m236_new_tests.note: The hardening ledger recorded 72; the true figure at the end of harden was 74, and the close added 9 more.

standing_carry_correction.detail: The carry was briefed as '14 pre-existing demo-stack failures'. A full-suite sweep found 19: the 14 demo-stack ones PLUS 5 in stack-core that no ledger named -- the story-org-count guard (the preset has shipped 4 orgs since v2.4 M223 while docs and the guard's own test still said 3) and the demo-knob guard (DEMO_NO_ACADEMY_FILL, the knob that GATES Thread A, undocumented). Both guards were red and CORRECT. Fixed at this close, so the standing carry is back to exactly 14 -- and is now a measured number rather than a copied one.

close.deferral_audit: RED -- the 14-failure carry is a genuine repeat-deferral (10 milestones, 2 releases) whose declared destination (the v2.4 release close) already fired once without landing it. Escalated to the user; see decisions.md CLOSE-D2. The milestone did NOT merge.
close.gate_reading_provenance: The 29/29 reading was taken on playbill-m236-hardened. The close then fixed 10 defects in that same harness, unit-proven (66 harness specs) but NOT re-run live -- see decisions.md CLOSE-D3.
